settings.intro_text:
Welcome to Earthen Story. These Terms of Service govern your use of our website at earthenstory.com and your purchase of any products from us. Please read them carefully before placing an order or using our site.

By accessing our website or making a purchase, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our website or services.
settings.cta_desc: We're happy to clarify anything. Reach out and we'll respond within one business day.

settings.content:
This website is operated by Earthen Story Pvt. Ltd. Throughout these Terms, the words “we”, “us”, and “our” refer to Earthen Story Pvt. Ltd., and the words “you” and “your” refer to the user or customer visiting our website or purchasing from us.

We offer products, information, and services through this website subject to your acceptance of all the terms, conditions, policies, and notices stated here. These Terms apply to all users of the site, including without limitation browsers, customers, and contributors of content.
settings.highlight_text: Our promise: We are committed to honest, transparent dealings. Our products are exactly what we say they are — certified organic, traditionally processed, and free from additives and preservatives.

settings.content:
We reserve the right to refuse service to anyone, for any reason, at any time. We may limit or cancel quantities purchased per person, household, or order.

  • Product images are representative. Actual appearance may vary slightly due to natural variation in organic produce, packaging updates, and lighting differences in photography.
  • We reserve the right to discontinue any product at any time.
  • We shall not be liable to you or any third party for any modification, price change, suspension, or discontinuance of a product.
  • We have made every effort to display the colours and images of our products as accurately as possible. We cannot guarantee that your screen's display is accurate.

All orders are subject to availability. We reserve the right to cancel an order if a product becomes unavailable after your purchase, in which case a full refund will be issued promptly.
settings.warning_text: Note on food products: Our products are food items intended for personal consumption. Please check all ingredient and allergen information before purchase. If you have specific health conditions or dietary requirements, consult a healthcare professional before use.

settings.content:
All prices on our website are listed in Indian Rupees (₹) and are inclusive of applicable taxes unless stated otherwise. We reserve the right to change prices at any time without prior notice.

  • Payment is due at the time of placing your order.
  • We accept all major credit and debit cards, UPI, net banking, and other payment methods available at checkout.
  • Payment processing is handled by our secure third-party payment gateway. We do not store your full card details on our servers.
  • In the event of a pricing error, we reserve the right to cancel affected orders and issue a full refund.

Promotional codes and discounts are subject to their own terms and cannot be combined unless explicitly stated. We reserve the right to withdraw or amend any offer at any time.

We ship across India. Shipping timelines and charges are displayed at checkout and are subject to your location and the delivery partner's terms.

  • Orders are typically processed within 1–2 business days of payment confirmation.
  • Estimated delivery times are 3–7 business days depending on your location.
  • Free shipping is available on orders above ₹799.
  • We are not responsible for delays caused by courier partners, natural events, or circumstances beyond our control.
  • Risk of loss and title for items purchased from us pass to you upon delivery to the courier.

If your order has not arrived within the expected timeframe, please contact us at contact@earthenstory.com and we will investigate with our delivery partner.

We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. If you are unhappy with your order for any reason, please reach out to us within 3 days of delivery.

  • Returns are accepted for products that are damaged, defective, or incorrectly sent.
  • Due to the perishable nature of food products, we are unable to accept returns for change of mind once the product has been opened.
  • Refunds will be processed to your original payment method within 7–10 business days of our receiving and inspecting the returned item.
  • Shipping charges are non-refundable unless the return is due to our error.

To initiate a return, email us at contact@earthenstory.com with your order number and reason for return.

If you create an account on our website, you are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.

  • You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information when creating your account.
  • You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorised use of your account.
  • We reserve the right to terminate accounts or refuse service at our discretion.
  • You may request deletion of your account at any time by contacting us at contact@earthenstory.com.

All content on this website — including but not limited to text, photographs, graphics, logos, product names, and the Earthen Story brand — is the exclusive property of Earthen Story Pvt. Ltd. and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws.

  • You may not reproduce, duplicate, copy, sell, or exploit any portion of our website or content without our express written permission.
  • “Earthen Story” and our logo are trademarks of Earthen Story Pvt. Ltd. and may not be used without authorisation.
  • You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable licence to access and use the website for personal, non-commercial purposes only.

In addition to other restrictions set forth in these Terms, you are prohibited from using the website or its content:

  • For any unlawful purpose or to solicit others to perform unlawful acts
  • To transmit any unsolicited or unauthorised advertising or promotional material (spam)
  • To impersonate Earthen Story, our employees, or any other person or entity
  • To upload or transmit viruses, malware, or any other malicious code
  • To harvest or collect email addresses or personal information from other users
  • To interfere with or circumvent the security features of our website
  • For any commercial purpose or for the benefit of any third party without our express written consent

We reserve the right to terminate your use of the website for violating any of the prohibited uses.

Our website and products are provided on an “as is” and “as available” basis. We make no representations or warranties of any kind, express or implied, regarding the completeness, accuracy, reliability, suitability, or availability of the website or products.

  • We do not warrant that the website will be uninterrupted, timely, secure, or error-free.
  • Product information including descriptions, ingredients, and nutritional values is provided in good faith. Always read the product label before use.
  • Nothing on this website constitutes medical or nutritional advice. Please consult a qualified healthcare professional for dietary guidance.
settings.warning_text: Health disclaimer: Our products are natural food items. Results from consuming our products may vary. We make no claims to treat, cure, or prevent any medical condition.

settings.content:
To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, Earthen Story Pvt. Ltd., its directors, officers, employees, and agents shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from:

  • Your use of or inability to use our website or products
  • Any errors or omissions in the content of the website
  • Unauthorised access to or use of our servers or any personal information stored therein
  • Any interruption or cessation of transmission to or from our website

Our total liability to you for any cause of action shall not exceed the amount you paid for the specific order giving rise to the claim.

These Terms of Service and any separate agreements whereby we provide you services shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India.

Any disputes arising in connection with these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in Bengaluru, Karnataka, India.

If any provision of these Terms is found to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.

We reserve the right to update or change these Terms of Service at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting to the website. We will indicate the date of last revision at the top of this page.

Your continued use of our website or services following the posting of any changes constitutes your acceptance of those changes. We encourage you to review this page periodically.
settings.highlight_text: Questions about a change? If you have concerns about any update to these Terms, please contact us before continuing to use our services.

settings.content:
If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:

  • Email: contact@earthenstory.com
  • Company: Earthen Story Pvt. Ltd.
  • Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India
  • Website: www.earthenstory.com

We aim to respond to all queries within 5 business days.
settings.card2_text: Earthen Story Pvt. Ltd., Bengaluru, India
